title: Demo Gym | Indore | VEDAM
heroDesc: Join Indore's most advanced fitness center with world-class equipment and expert trainers.
aboutP1: Established in 2014, Demo Gym has been at the forefront of fitness excellence in Indore.
aboutP2: Our state-of-the-art facility features imported equipment, certified trainers, and a supportive community.
servicesDesc: Comprehensive fitness programs for every goal

services.name: Strength Training
services.desc: Build muscle and increase power with our extensive free weights section.

services.name: Cardio Zone
services.desc: State-of-the-art treadmills, cycles, and cross-trainers for endurance.

services.name: Personal Training
services.desc: One-on-one sessions with certified trainers tailored to your goals.

services.name: Zumba & Aerobics
services.desc: Fun, high-energy group classes to get fit while having a blast.

services.name: Yoga Classes
services.desc: Find balance and flexibility with expert yoga instruction.

services.name: Nutrition Plans
services.desc: Customized diet plans to complement your fitness journey.

testimonials.quote: Demo Gym completely transformed my fitness journey. The trainers are incredible and the equipment is top-notch.
testimonials.name: Rahul Sharma

testimonials.quote: Best gym in Indore! Clean facility, great community, and the results speak for themselves.
testimonials.name: Priya Patel

testimonials.quote: I've tried many gyms but Demo Gym stands out for its personal attention and professional approach.
testimonials.name: Amit Jain

contactDesc: Ready to start your fitness journey? Reach out to us today.

contactInfo.title: Hours
contactInfo.text: Mon-Sat: 5 AM – 10 PM | Sun: 6 AM – 8 PM

title: Demo Salon | Bhopal | VEDAM
heroDesc: Bhopal's premier beauty destination for bridal makeup, hair styling, and complete makeovers.
aboutP1: At Demo Salon, we believe every person deserves to look and feel their absolute best.
aboutP2: Our team of experienced stylists uses premium products and latest techniques to deliver stunning results.

services.name: Bridal Makeup
services.desc: Complete bridal packages with HD/airbrush makeup for your special day.

services.name: Hair Styling
services.desc: Trendy cuts, blowouts, and styling for every occasion.

services.name: Hair Coloring
services.desc: Global, highlights, balayage, and fashion colors by experts.

services.name: Nail Art
services.desc: Gel nails, acrylic extensions, and creative nail art designs.

services.name: Facial & Cleanup
services.desc: Deep cleansing facials and skin treatments for a radiant glow.

services.name: Spa Treatments
services.desc: Relaxing body massages, scrubs, and aromatherapy sessions.

testimonials.quote: My bridal makeup was absolutely flawless! Everyone complimented how natural yet stunning I looked.
testimonials.name: Neha Verma

testimonials.quote: Best salon experience in Bhopal. The staff is so professional and the ambiance is amazing.

testimonials.quote: I've been coming here for 3 years and the quality never dips. Highly recommended!

contactDesc: Book your appointment today and let us make you look your best.
